meta.title: Acodemia — Learn to Code
meta.description: Interactive coding platform. Learn dozens of programming languages.

home.heroDesc: Learn Python, JavaScript, C++, Java and dozens more programming languages with interactive lessons. Earn XP, level up, compete on the leaderboard!
home.whyDesc: Features that make coding fun and accessible

features.title: Write real code
features.desc: Write code in your browser and see results instantly. No setup required.

features.title: Gamified learning
features.desc: Earn XP, level up, collect badges and compete on the leaderboard.

features.title: Bilingual platform
features.desc: All lessons, explanations and assignments available in Azerbaijani and English.

features.title: CS curriculum
features.desc: Lessons aligned with the national exam curriculum. From theory to practice.

features.title: Quizzes & exams
features.desc: Test your knowledge, compete in timed quizzes and track your results.

features.title: Access anywhere
features.desc: Computer, tablet or phone — log in from any device.

home.ctaDesc: Sign up for free and complete your first lesson today.

login.brandDesc: Interactive lessons, gamified learning and real coding experience.
login.title: Log in to your account
login.subtitle: Enter your email and password

register.brandDesc: 20 interactive lessons, gamified system and HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Python courses are waiting for you.
register.title: Create a new account
register.subtitle: Sign up for free and start coding

lessons.title: Lessons
lessons.subtitle: 4 modules, 20 interactive lessons
lessons.notFoundDesc: This lesson is not ready yet. Coming soon!

playground.title: Playground
playground.desc: Write and test code freely — in any language!

quiz.title: Quizzes
quiz.subtitle: Test your knowledge and earn XP

profile.badgesEncourage: Complete more lessons to earn more badges!
